ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the event in minutes */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (home, away, neutral) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (scheduled, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "broadcast_time" TEXT /* Exact broadcast time if different from start time */,
  "tv_network" INTEGER /* Reference to the TV network broadcasting the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of ticket availability (e.g., available, sold out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_tv_network FOREIGN KEY ("tv_network") REFERENCES tv_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (stadium, arena, etc.) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the venue */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of available facilities (parking, concessions, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV network */,
  "network_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the TV network's logo */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographic coverage area of the network */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact details for the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the ticket is for */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the venue */,
  "row" TEXT /* Row in the section */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, reserved, sold) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (general, VIP, etc.) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the ticket */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, organizer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (favorite teams, notification settings, etc.) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the organizer is responsible for */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the organizer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the organizer within the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, cancellation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (completed, refunded, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_transactions_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
